benefits.description: Tanned quickly and significantly; describes going from Irish to Greek in skin tone; 'crazy tan' result

side_effects.description: Nausea was significant when taken during the day; overwhelming nausea if taken in the morning; recommends taking at night

protocol_notes: Started with 250mcg daily for 5 days combined with tanning bed 1-2x per week. Then reduced to 200mcg 1x per week with continued tanning bed use. Now on 200mcg every 10 days. Research started after Christmas, still on first bottle. Has some freckles but not super fair skin. Takes injections at night to mitigate nausea. Notes libido is last thing on mind when nauseous from daytime dosing. Unclear whether tanning bed is required for MT2 to work.
